headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Cummins, Raises Price Target to $693
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jerry Revich   maintains Cummins (NYSE:CMI) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $630 to $693.

headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Monday
summary: Oil prices are surging again after the U.S. and Iran's talks were unsuccessful. Goldman shares dropped on earnings.
